title: Login Issues - Can't Access Account
description: Customer is unable to log in to their account. They've tried resetting their password multiple times but still cannot access it.

title: Payment Failed - Card Declined
description: Customer attempted to pay using Visa ending 1234 but the payment keeps failing despite sufficient balance.

title: Unable to Download Invoice
description: Customer cannot download their January invoice from the billing section. The download button is not working.

title: Incorrect Billing Address
description: Customer’s billing address shows a different city. They updated it but it still displays the old one.

title: App Crash on Launch
description: Customer reports that the mobile app crashes immediately upon opening on Android 13.

title: Refund Not Processed
description: Customer requested a refund two weeks ago but has not received the amount yet.

title: Two-Factor Authentication Issue
description: Customer is not receiving 2FA codes on their registered phone number.

title: Unable to Update Profile Picture
description: Customer tries to upload a new profile picture but receives an 'Upload failed' error.

title: Subscription Auto-Renewal
description: Customer wants to enable auto-renewal for their subscription but the toggle option is disabled.

title: Missing Order Confirmation Email
description: Customer placed an order but didn't receive a confirmation email even though payment succeeded.

title: Password Reset Link Expired
description: Customer reports that the password reset link sent via email expires immediately after clicking.

title: Delay in Order Shipment
description: Customer states that their order has not been shipped even after three days of purchase.

title: Coupon Code Not Working
description: Customer attempted to apply a promotional coupon but the system says the code is invalid.

title: Account Verification Pending
description: Customer uploaded identity documents but their account verification is still pending.

title: Notification Emails Not Received
description: Customer says they are not receiving important notification emails from the platform.
